name: Gödel Numbering Algorithm
description: Assign a unique natural number to each formula of arithmetic by recursively encoding the syntax tree with prime exponentiation (standard Gödel-style numbering). This algorithm is the algorithm capsule sibling of the logical diagonal construction in the incompleteness proof graph.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["Input: formula phi as finite parse tree"]
    B1["Assign numeric codes to atomic symbols"]
    C1["Initialize postorder walk over subformulas"]
    D1{"More internal nodes?"}
    E1["Leaf: emit code for symbol from lookup table"]
    F1["Compound: combine child codes with fixed prime-power packing"]
    G1["Quantifier: merge bounded variable code with body encoding"]
    H1["Contract to single natural"]
    I1["Output Gödel number of phi"]
    A1 --> B1
    B1 --> C1
    C1 --> D1
    D1 -->|yes|E1
    E1 --> F1
    F1 --> G1
    G1 --> C1
    D1 -->|no|H1
    H1 --> I1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000,stroke:#f59f00
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lightblue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef violet fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lavender fill:#e6e6fa,color:#333,stroke:#b19cd9
    class A1 red
    class B1,C1 yellow
    class E1,F1,G1 green
    class H1 lightblue
    class I1 violet
    class D1 lavender
